phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter o carimbo oficial da Câmara?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR AW kuh-REEM-boo aw-fee-SEEAHL DUH KAHN-muh-ruh?

likely_response.local: Pode solicitar o carimbo ao rececionista municipal ou ao agente de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih soo-lee-see-TAHR AW kuh-REEM-boo OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh moo-nee-see-PAHL OHW OW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: You can request the stamp from the municipal receptionist or information agent.

responses.english: You can request the stamp from the municipal receptionist or information agent.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih soo-lee-see-TAHR AW kuh-REEM-boo OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh moo-nee-see-PAHL OHW OW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Pode solicitar o carimbo ao rececionista municipal ou ao agente de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Algarve events mural is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mural de eventos do Algarve?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-kah oo moo-RAHL jee-ee-VEN-toos doo-al-GAR-vee
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist staff prioritize concise, precise directions to maintain efficiency.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto à entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the caves interactive map is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está o mapa interativo das grutas?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW MAH-puh een-tih-ruh-TEE-voo DUHSH GROO-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The stamp is the official city stamp, often used for visitor passports.

likely_response.local: No balcão central, ao lado do carimbo.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN sayngt-RAHL, OW LAH-doo DOO kuh-REEM-boo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the central counter, next to the stamp.

responses.english: At the central counter, next to the stamp.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN sayngt-RAHL, OW LAH-doo DOO kuh-REEM-boo.
responses.local: No balcão central, ao lado do carimbo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional brochures wall is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica a parede de folhetos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-REH-dih DIH foo-LYEH-toosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Pointing is common, but use an open hand, not a finger.

likely_response.local: Na parede à direita, perto da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH puh-REH-dih AH dee-RAY-tuh, PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: On the wall to the right, near the entrance.

responses.english: On the wall to the right, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: NUH puh-REH-dih AH dee-RAY-tuh, PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Na parede à direita, perto da entrada.
